description_long: This bungalow features a steeply pitched, dark green gable roof with a prominent central entrance framed by a small gabled porch. The facade is symmetrical, with three sets of rectangular windows on either side of the main door, each window divided into smaller panes and framed in brown. The walls are a light beige color, accented by brown structural beams and trim, giving the building a classic, cozy appearance. The side elevations reveal arched windows grouped in threes, echoing the symmetrical design of the front. The rear of the bungalow is plain, with no visible windows or doors, and the roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing additional shelter. The overall structure suggests a single-story dwelling with a traditional, craftsman-inspired style.
description: A single-story bungalow with a steep green gable roof, symmetrical window arrangements, and a central gabled entrance. The exterior features beige walls with brown trim and grouped arched windows on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central gabled entrance, symmetrical rectangular windows, and brown trim details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting three grouped arched windows and the overhanging gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with no windows or doors and the full span of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three grouped arched windows and visible roof overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped arched side windows
